About Us

Ferensa Studio is a private, thoughtfully designed multipurpose space dedicated to wellness, creativity, and connection. Located in Depok, Ferensa was created as an intimate and inspiring sanctuary where everyone can unwind, explore, and grow at their own pace, and in their own space.

Ferensa is here to be your one-stop solution for thoughtfully curated events and creative space rentals in Indonesia. Our mission is to empower communities, creators, and mindful brands through intentional experiences that celebrate well-being, creativity, and meaningful connection.

Our Essence

What guides us in creating meaningful space for our community

Intentionality

Every detail is thoughtfully designed with purpose and care

Community

Building genuine connections and supportive relationships

Growth

Supporting your journey at your own pace and rhythm

Authenticity

Creating space for you to show up as your true self

Ferensa Studio

A place where community and connection flow as freely as our breath.

Our Classes

  • Yoga
  • Mat Pilates
  • Creative Workshops
  • Seasonal Events
